work_package_result.summary: Added a documented credential-free Head demo and integration test that run the provider-neutral fake agent, return a correlated Result Envelope and commit the matching in-memory Memory Event.

passed: just demo-fake with emitted command, result and memory-event identifiers
cargo test -p dennett-head: credential-free fake conversation integration test
33 developer-tool unit tests and 2 Python adapter-host tests
Rust format, clippy and workspace tests
desktop, mobile and Node adapter-host TypeScript checks
protocol generation and compatibility checks against origin/main
not_run: repeated or concurrent command correlation is outside this single-command proof
runtime and memory failure injection belongs to later resilience packages

review.method: R2 detached review in a fresh independent agent context using the exact commit diff and relevant unchanged core contracts

observability_changes: just demo-fake emits submitted command, Result Envelope, Memory Event, project and session identifiers
known_limitations: Result-to-memory correlation is proven for one command against a fresh in-memory event log
The integration test exercises the public use case while stdout is verified by the separately required just demo-fake command
This package covers the deterministic success path and does not inject runtime or memory failures
